top_claims.claim: Net income moved -10.5% versus the prior period (504,918.0 to 452,031.0).
Leadership / governance on watch. 2 executive sales ($343,258) in 120d
Operating cash flow growth moved from -28.6% to +24.4% YoY in the latest quarter. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.

Akamai is a profitable edge platform pivoting from legacy content delivery toward cloud compute and security. FY2025 free cash flow was $1.01 billion ($6.88 per diluted share) after $508 million capital spending; management repurchased $800 million of stock. Q1 2026 revenue rose 5.8% but operating profit fell 26% as co

risk_claims.claim: Net income moved -10.5% versus the prior period (504,918.0 to 452,031.0).
*Primary risk: Compute growth fails to offset Security pricing pressure, leaving consolidated free cash flow flat while lease obligations (~$1.6B ROU assets) and capex remain elevated.
Inversion: If Security stabilizes and Compute reaches 10%+ growth with margin recovery, multiple re-rates toward 25× cash flow.
